Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-31 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
CLMT dominates today's ranking at #1 with a composite score of 96.8, driven by exceptional returns across all timeframes (175% over one year, 96% over six months) and perfect SMA positioning above all key moving averages. The stock shows remarkably consistent momentum ratios (4 out of 5 pass consistency thresholds) and maintains strong outperformance versus SPY and QQQ, though its momentum signal of 2.8 is flagged as "overextended," suggesting the move may have exhausted near-term catalysts. APA ranks second with solid fundamentals (110.76% one-year return, all SMAs passed) but shows weakness on bad SPY days with a score of 2.8119 versus CLMT's resilient 0.9864, indicating APA declined more sharply when the broader market sold off. The data reveals a clear bifurcation: CLMT appears to have momentum independent of market stress, while APA's gains are more correlated with market swings and therefore less defensible in a pullback scenario.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

Click column headers to sort  |  Score = percentile composite: returns + ratio passes + bad-SPY resilience  |  SMA ✓ = price above all SMAs (30/50/100/200)  |  Ratio = short-term momentum consistency (out of 5 tests)  |  M = momentum signal (sortable) —  ● clean  ● stalling  ● overextended  |  V = volume confirmation (sortable) —  ● confirmed  ● normal  ○ thin  |  PB = entry timing: down day on strong stock (sortable by 1d return) —  ● buy today  ○ none  |  OL = theme overlap vs owned tickers —  ● overlap  ○ clear
